categories.name: Expired Listing Outreach
categories.description: Reach out to homeowners whose listing expired with another agent.
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by MLS expired listing data or manual
categories.notes: Prospecting card. Must be empathetic, not salesy. 'I know that's frustrating.'

categories.name: New Neighbor / Just Sold
categories.description: Introduce yourself to neighbors around a recent sale.
categories.whenToSend: Within 2 weeks of closing a sale in area
categories.notes: Farming card. 'I just helped your neighbor at 123 Oak St. If you ever need anything...'

categories.name: 10-Year Upgrade Nudge
categories.description: After 10 years in their home, suggest it might be time to consider upgrading.
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by closing date at 10-year mark
categories.notes: Gentle. 'A lot changes in 10 years. If your family has grown, I'm here to help.'

categories.name: FSBO Outreach
categories.description: Reach out to For Sale By Owner listings. Offer expertise without pressure.
categories.notes: Empathy first: 'Selling your own home is a big undertaking. If you ever want a second opinion...'

categories.name: Post-Showing Follow-Up
categories.description: Thank buyer for attending showing. Recap highlights, next steps.
categories.whenToSend: Same day or next day after showing
categories.notes: Differentiator: most agents just text. A handwritten follow-up stands out.

categories.name: Offer Submitted / Under Contract
categories.description: Excitement card when offer is accepted. Celebrate the milestone.
categories.notes: Builds excitement during the stressful waiting period before closing.

categories.name: Escrow Opened
categories.description: Acknowledge the escrow milestone. Remind of remaining steps.
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by transaction status change or manual
categories.notes: Keeps client engaged and confident during the process.

categories.name: Deal Fell Through / Encouragement
categories.description: Console and encourage when a deal falls apart. Lay out next steps.
categories.whenToSend: Within 2-3 days of deal falling through
categories.notes: Most agents disappear when deals fall through. This card builds deep loyalty.

categories.name: Sphere of Influence Touch
categories.description: Quarterly touch to your sphere. No ask. Just staying connected.
categories.notes: Amanda Furman model: 5 notes a day to sphere. Referral pipeline maintenance.

categories.name: Pre-Listing Consultation Follow-Up
categories.description: Thank homeowner for meeting. Recap your marketing plan.
categories.whenToSend: Same day or next day after consultation
categories.notes: Competitive differentiator. Most agents email a CMA. You send a handwritten note.

categories.name: Open House Follow-Up
categories.description: Thank visitors who attended your open house.
categories.triggerTiming: Manual. From sign-in sheet at open house.
categories.notes: Captures leads who might otherwise disappear. Handwritten stands out vs email drip.

categories.name: Seasonal Homeowner Tips
categories.description: Share seasonal home maintenance reminders. Position as helpful resource.
categories.notes: Not a sales touch. Genuine value: 'Winter's coming, don't forget to...' with your info.

categories.name: Home Anniversary
categories.description: Celebrate the anniversary of their home purchase. Stay top of mind annually.
categories.notes: Include a 'how's the home treating you?' tone. Natural lead-in to check if they're thinking of moving.

categories.name: Listing Anniversary / Market Update
categories.description: For past sellers: note anniversary and share market appreciation data.
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by listing sale date, annually
categories.notes: Great for sellers who may buy again or refer. Demonstrates ongoing market expertise.

categories.name: Post-Closing Congratulations
categories.description: Congratulate buyer/seller on closing. THE most important real estate card.
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by closing date in CRM/MLS
categories.notes: 61% of buyers come from referrals/repeat (NAR 2025). This card starts the long game.

templates.name: Post-Closing Congratulations - Template 1
templates.content: You're a homeowner! I don't think that ever gets old to say. Congratulations. This is such a big deal and I was honored to be a part of it.

templates.name: Post-Closing Congratulations - Template 2
templates.content: Congratulations on closing! After everything we went through to get here, I hope it feels every bit as good as you imagined. Enjoy every moment in your new home.

templates.name: Post-Closing Congratulations - Template 3
templates.content: Keys in hand. It's yours. Congratulations! Thank you for trusting me to help make this happen. I couldn't be happier for you.

templates.name: Post-Closing Congratulations - Template 4
templates.content: Closing day is my favorite day. Watching someone get the keys to their new home never gets old. Congratulations! I hope you love every square foot.

templates.name: Post-Closing Congratulations - Template 5
templates.content: What an amazing milestone. I'm so glad I got to be part of this journey with you. Congratulations on your new home and the next chapter that comes with it.

templates.name: Home Anniversary - Template 1
templates.content: One year ago you got the keys and I've been thinking about you since. Happy home anniversary! Hope the place has been treating you well.

templates.name: Home Anniversary - Template 2
templates.content: Can't believe it's already been a year in your home! Wishing you many more happy years there. And as always, I'm here if you ever need anything.

templates.name: Home Anniversary - Template 3
templates.content: Happy anniversary in your home! It's been a year since closing day and I just wanted to mark the occasion and say it was a pleasure being your agent.

templates.name: Home Anniversary - Template 4
templates.content: Time flies! A year ago today we closed on your home. I hope it's been everything you hoped for. Reach out anytime if you need me.

templates.name: Listing Anniversary / Market Update - Template 1
templates.content: It's been a year since we sold your home and I wanted to reach out and say homes like yours in the area are doing really well. Hope things have been great for you since.

templates.name: Listing Anniversary / Market Update - Template 2
templates.content: One year ago we got your home sold and I'm still proud of how that went. Hope the move treated you well. I'm always around if you need real estate advice.

templates.name: Listing Anniversary / Market Update - Template 3
templates.content: Just wanted to mark the anniversary of your sale and share that the market in your old neighborhood has been moving. Hope everything's been great on your end.

templates.name: Listing Anniversary / Market Update - Template 4
templates.content: A year since closing on your sale! Time really does fly. The market has changed a lot since then. Reach out anytime if you want to chat about real estate.

templates.name: Post-Showing Follow-Up - Template 1
templates.content: Thank you so much for taking the time to come see the property today. I hope it gave you some good ideas for what you're looking for. I'm here whenever you have questions.

templates.name: Post-Showing Follow-Up - Template 2
templates.content: Really glad you could make it to the showing. Wanted to follow up and say if anything stood out to you, good or bad, I'd love to hear it. I'm here to help you find the right fit.

templates.name: Post-Showing Follow-Up - Template 3
templates.content: Thanks for coming out today. I know searching for a home takes real time and energy. I appreciate you trusting me to help. Let's keep the conversation going.

templates.name: Post-Showing Follow-Up - Template 4
templates.content: Great seeing you at the showing. No pressure at all, but if you have any thoughts or questions on what you saw, reach out anytime. Happy to help you think it through.

templates.name: Offer Submitted / Under Contract - Template 1
templates.content: We're under contract! I'm so excited for you and I just want you to know I'm with you all the way to closing. Let's get you those keys.

templates.name: Offer Submitted / Under Contract - Template 2
templates.content: Your offer got accepted and I had to write this by hand because an email just didn't feel like enough. This is a big deal. Congratulations! Now let's finish strong.

templates.name: Offer Submitted / Under Contract - Template 3
templates.content: Under contract! This is such a great moment. The hard part is mostly behind us and I want you to know I'm going to make sure everything from here goes as smoothly as possible.

templates.name: Offer Submitted / Under Contract - Template 4
templates.content: Huge news today. You're under contract! I'm proud of how we navigated this and I'll be right here every step until we close.

templates.name: Escrow Opened - Template 1
templates.content: Escrow is officially open and we're on our way. I just want you to know where we are and that I'm on top of everything happening between now and closing day.

templates.name: Escrow Opened - Template 2
templates.content: Just a quick note to let you know escrow is open and things are moving in the right direction. You're in good hands and I'll keep you updated every step of the way.

templates.name: Escrow Opened - Template 3
templates.content: We've opened escrow! This is a great sign. The finish line is getting closer. I'll be with you through every step that's left.

templates.name: Escrow Opened - Template 4
templates.content: Escrow is open and the process is humming along. Thank you for your patience and trust. I'll make sure nothing falls through the cracks.

templates.name: Deal Fell Through / Encouragement - Template 1
templates.content: I know today was really disappointing and I'm sorry. I've been in real estate a long time and I can tell you this happens and then the right thing comes along. I'm still in your corner.

templates.name: Deal Fell Through / Encouragement - Template 2
templates.content: This one didn't work out and I know that stings. But I also know you're going to find the right home. I'm not going anywhere and I want to keep helping until we get there.

templates.name: Deal Fell Through / Encouragement - Template 3
templates.content: I wanted to write because I know how much you wanted this one. I'm sorry it didn't come together. Take a breath, and when you're ready, I'm ready. We'll find the right one.

templates.name: Deal Fell Through / Encouragement - Template 4
templates.content: Deals fall through sometimes and it never gets easier to deliver that news. But I believe the right home is still out there for you. I'm here whenever you're ready to keep going.

templates.name: Expired Listing Outreach - Template 1
templates.content: I noticed your listing expired recently and I'm sure that's frustrating. I've helped a few homeowners in similar situations and I'd love to share what I think makes the difference. No obligation at all.

templates.name: Expired Listing Outreach - Template 2
templates.content: Having a listing expire is one of the most discouraging things in real estate. I've been there with clients and helped them come back stronger. I'd love to have a conversation if you're open to it.

templates.name: Expired Listing Outreach - Template 3
templates.content: I'm reaching out because your listing recently expired and I think there are some things worth looking at before you relist. I'd be happy to give you my honest assessment, no strings attached.

templates.name: Expired Listing Outreach - Template 4
templates.content: When a listing expires it usually means something needs to change, not necessarily the price. I'd love 20 minutes to walk you through what I'm seeing and what I'd do differently.

templates.name: Sphere of Influence Touch - Template 1
templates.content: Just thinking about you today and figured I'd drop a note. Hope life is treating you well. You know I'm always here if you need anything real estate related or otherwise.

templates.name: Sphere of Influence Touch - Template 2
templates.content: Haven't talked in a while and I just wanted to say hello. Hope everything's great on your end. Reach out anytime, I love hearing from people I care about.

templates.name: Sphere of Influence Touch - Template 3
templates.content: Quick note to say I'm still here, still grateful to know you, and always happy to help if anything comes up. Hope your year is going well.

templates.name: Sphere of Influence Touch - Template 4
templates.content: Just a quick hello from my end. No agenda at all. Just didn't want too much time to go by without reaching out. Hope things are wonderful.

templates.name: New Neighbor / Just Sold - Template 1
templates.content: Hi neighbor! I just helped someone on your street buy their home and wanted to introduce myself. If you ever have questions about what's happening in the local market, I'd love to be your resource.

templates.name: New Neighbor / Just Sold - Template 2
templates.content: I wanted to reach out because I just closed a sale in your neighborhood. If you've ever thought about what your home might be worth, I'm happy to share what I'm seeing. No obligation.

templates.name: New Neighbor / Just Sold - Template 3
templates.content: Just sold a home nearby and wanted to introduce myself to the neighborhood. Real estate is a relationship business and I'd love to be the agent you think of when the time comes.

templates.name: New Neighbor / Just Sold - Template 4
templates.content: Hi! I'm a local real estate agent and I just helped one of your neighbors sell their home. If you ever want a no-pressure market update for your area, I'm always happy to chat.

templates.name: Pre-Listing Consultation Follow-Up - Template 1
templates.content: Thank you for having me over today. I really enjoyed our conversation and I'm confident we can get your home sold for what it deserves. I'll be in touch soon with next steps.

templates.name: Pre-Listing Consultation Follow-Up - Template 2
templates.content: Just wanted to follow up from our meeting and say thank you. I put a lot of thought into what I shared with you and I genuinely believe I'm the right person to help you with this.

templates.name: Pre-Listing Consultation Follow-Up - Template 3
templates.content: Really appreciated the time today. I know you're weighing your options and I want you to know I'll bring everything I have to this if you choose to work with me.

templates.name: Pre-Listing Consultation Follow-Up - Template 4
templates.content: Thank you for the meeting today. I hope the information was useful regardless of what you decide. If you choose me, I promise I'll work hard to earn your trust every day.

templates.name: 10-Year Upgrade Nudge - Template 1
templates.content: You've been in your home for 10 years now. A lot has changed, in the market and probably in your life too. If you've ever thought about what's next, I'd love to have that conversation.

templates.name: 10-Year Upgrade Nudge - Template 2
templates.content: Ten years is a big milestone in homeownership. If your family has grown or your needs have shifted, it might be worth exploring what a move could look like. I'm happy to think through it with you.

templates.name: 10-Year Upgrade Nudge - Template 3
templates.content: Just noting that it's been about 10 years in your home. The market has been interesting and homes like yours are doing well. If you've ever been curious about what it's worth now, reach out.

templates.name: 10-Year Upgrade Nudge - Template 4
templates.content: Hard to believe it's been 10 years! A lot can change. If you've ever wondered whether it's time for something new, I'd love to run some numbers for you. Just say the word.

templates.name: FSBO Outreach - Template 1
templates.content: I noticed you're selling your home on your own and I just want to say I respect that. It's a big undertaking. If you ever want a second set of eyes or a quick conversation about the process, I'm happy to help.

templates.name: FSBO Outreach - Template 2
templates.content: Selling on your own takes a lot of work. I've helped a number of FSBOs and I know how much goes into it. If there's ever anything I can do to make it easier, please reach out. No strings attached.

templates.name: FSBO Outreach - Template 3
templates.content: I drove by your sign and wanted to reach out personally. Selling without an agent is absolutely doable and I respect the decision. If you hit any walls, I'm here as a resource.

templates.name: FSBO Outreach - Template 4
templates.content: I know you've chosen to go FSBO and that's completely valid. I just wanted to put my name out there in case you ever want to talk through the process. No pressure, just a resource.

templates.name: Open House Follow-Up - Template 1
templates.content: So glad you stopped by the open house! I hope you got a good feel for the property. I'd love to answer any questions you have and help you figure out if it's the right fit.

templates.name: Open House Follow-Up - Template 2
templates.content: Thanks for coming to the open house today. It was great to see you there. If anything stood out to you about the home, I'd love to continue that conversation.

templates.name: Open House Follow-Up - Template 3
templates.content: Really appreciate you taking time out of your day to come see the property. Whether that was the one or not, I'd love to help you find the right home. I'm a great resource.

templates.name: Open House Follow-Up - Template 4
templates.content: Thank you for stopping by! Open houses are always better when people like you show up. Reach out anytime if you want to chat about the home or anything else you're looking for.

templates.name: Seasonal Homeowner Tips - Template 1
templates.content: Just wanted to send a quick note as the seasons change. A few things worth doing around the house this time of year: check your gutters, test your smoke detectors, and make sure your HVAC filter is fresh. Happy to recommend any local vendors if needed.

templates.name: Seasonal Homeowner Tips - Template 2
templates.content: Thinking of you as we head into a new season! Just a friendly reminder to take care of a few home maintenance items before the weather shifts. Your home will thank you.

templates.name: Seasonal Homeowner Tips - Template 3
templates.content: Quick homeowner heads up as the season changes. This is a great time to walk the perimeter of your home, check for any weather damage, and prep accordingly. Let me know if you need any local contractor recommendations.

templates.name: Seasonal Homeowner Tips - Template 4
templates.content: As a homeowner, seasonal maintenance can save a lot of headaches down the road. Just wanted to be a useful resource and remind you to take a look around the house as the weather shifts. I'm always here if you have questions.
